アニメーションタイプ = def
Are you here because of your dad? Or is it for onee-chan?
\SE[9]I'm actually meeting up with someone~. I was just wandering around
town when PrettyGal invited me for a night of karaoke over RIME~♪
\SE[13-nb]Come to think of it, we've never gone to karaoke just ourselves, have we?
Let's go together next time. I want to hear you sing, \n[1].
\SM[pop]\sa[121]\SE[2]Wah, I just got a RIME. Is she gonna be here soon?
It's not like things are awkward between us or anything, but I'll leave before she arrives.
I waved to Shino and left the place behind.
\SM[double]\sa[133]\SE[23]Yaho~, Shino-chan, \n[2]~. Thanks for coming and meeting me halfway~
\SM[tremble]\sa[133]\SE[23]Aahn--, your words of appreciation are seeping through me~...♪
I'm glad I powered through today too~♥
Kurumizawa Rino. Shino's older sister, and at the same time the onee-san I look up to.
Her love for Shino is so deep that it borders on crazy sometimes,
but regardless of that, she's always been a reliable onee-san to the two of us.
\SE[21-nb]You too, \n[2]. Thanks~. So, what were you two doing? Was it a date~?
\SM[jump]\sa[130]\SE[54-nb]D-D-Date?!.... Ah, onee-chan. there's something I gotta tell you later.
\SM[double]\SE[13-nb]Eh?! What? Is that an invite into bed tonight? Onee-chan's always down, you know?

Unlimited extensions are on the table too, right? Guess I'll buy some cans of redbull 
while we walk~!
...I mean, I guess it's a good thing that they get along so well...?
go off about stuff like that~.
\sa[133]\se[20-nb]I mean, \n[2] would prefer a more lewd girl too, no~?
Is there a single guy out there that'd say no to that?
But I don't think I should give an honest answer this once,
pure and innocent types more, I-I'd say?
pure and innocent types more, I-I'd say?
\sa[130]\SE[12-nb]Huh? R-Really? You sure that's not a lie~?
Seems like that really was the right choice.
The moment I breathed a sigh of relief after seeing Shino break out into a smile...
It's not Shino nor Rino nee-san so... who could it be?
Thank you greatly for this feast....
Thank you greatly for this feast....
And thank you for accidentally sending the wrong photo.
(# Saved photos can be viewed in the [Photos] app)
The contents aside... I tell the two happily chatting away in front of me
about the fact that I just received a message from their mother, Kurumizawa Ayano-san.
\sa[123]\SE[3]Huh? A message from mama? I guess she must be off work early?
\SE[40]\SA[124]In that case, let's get mom in too, and get a family dinner going, onee-chan.
\SM[pop]\SE[15-nb]Great idea~, my genius sister! Been a while since we've had a family dinner like that.
It's a good thing for a family that doesn't get to spend much time together due to work to

have moments like these. I felt a bit proud, having had a slight hand in creating this situation 
for them.
...Though in my case, you couldn't convince me to have a single meal with my old man.
Still, receiving a RIME text from mom... just what did she send?
I am of course an honest man who's never told a lie so...
[Are the girls doing well?], that's all.
[Are the girls doing well?], that's all.
I spat out something convincing and shifted my gaze away from Shino's eyes,
and went off on my way home.
\SE[21-nb]See ya~. It's dark out so be careful on the way home~♪
\SM[nod]\SE[8]The me who wants to get some nice drink in vs the me who
wants to get home quick and treasure Shino-chan... Fight--!
\SM[nod]\SE[20-nb]Wait...? Wouldn't getting one or two drinks in and then going home and
pestering Shino-chan be the best combo...? Clang-Clang-Claaang, Draw!
Ahahah, looks like I showed you something embarrassing...
\sa[133]\SE[20-nb]Ufufuh~, that's right~, I was thinking of hitting up the bar
\SE[1]I'd love to go in with you, but that really would be too much.
Let's go in together when you grow up big and strong, okay?
A night out at the bar with a mature adult woman. It's a realm yet beyond
my comprehension, but I'm sure it's the combination of dreams.
I wouldn't want to get in her way, so I gave her a quick wave
and then left the place behind.
\SE[21-nb]Yeah, see ya. It's dark out so be careful on the way home~♪
I'm gonna confess for sure today... to that office lady at that company.
I wonder if she's got a man already... no way she doesn't, not with those tits.
